name: PATRIOT NATIONAL BANCORP INC
summary: Patriot National Bancorp, Inc. is a Connecticut-registered bank holding company whose principal asset is Patriot Bank, N.A., a national bank headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut. The Bank offers commercial real estate lending, high-net-worth credit facilities, demand and interest-bearing deposits, treasury management, ACH services, wire transfers, debit card services, and institutional banking for fintech companies and payment processors. As of December 31, 2025, it operated eight branches across Connecticut and New York.
